payload.answer: Sam's employment record has been updated. The fact that Sam works at Goldman has been retired as superseded. Sam is now recorded as currently working at Point72, with Goldman preserved as a former employer.
citations: New fact: 'Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.'
payload.conflict_classification: DIRECT_CONTRADICTION_SUPERSESSION — the new fact explicitly negates the current employment fact and replaces it with a new employer.
payload.decision: Supersede the existing fact that Sam works at Goldman. Commit two new facts: (1) Sam formerly worked at Goldman, and (2) Sam currently works at Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: Sam is an existing entity. Employment attribute is updated from Goldman to Point72. Goldman is retained as a historical employer relationship.
